explanations.6: This checks if a directory named '.output' exists; if it doesn't, the code creates it with permissions 0777 (readable and writable by everyone).
explanations.11: This takes a screenshot of the current webpage and saves it as a PNG file to disk, so you can visually inspect what the page looked like at this moment.
explanations.16: This finds all HTML elements on the page matching a CSS selector (in this case, navbar links), and stores them in an array called $elements.
explanations.28: This pauses the code for 1 second to give the website time to respond to the click and load the next page before continuing.
